note: LIVE-data manifest for lean-6module-v1.1 freshness gate. Every LIVE field carries >=2 independent sources fetched at as_of; verify_freshness.py cross-checks these against an independent Yahoo re-fetch and the decision_card value. FILED data (10-K/10-Q line items) is NOT here -- it rides the dated-source claim_ledger discipline. RE-VERIFICATION (INC-001 sweep): TSLA price $400.49 (2026-06-18 last close <= as_of) confirmed CORRECT by independent Yahoo re-fetch + stockanalysis ($400.49) + websearch (2026-06-19 close ~$398.50). Unlike NVDA, $400.49 is -19.7% off the 52wk high and +38.7% above the 52wk low (upper-middle of range), NOT near an extreme -> does NOT share the NVDA single-source low-grab bug.

live_fields.note: Card uses diluted 3,528M shares (S008) for internal consistency with T3 market-cap identity. stockanalysis quotes $1.50T on a larger ~3.76B share count (basic+). Range $1.4-1.5T per C4. Musk 423.7M-share grant would dilute further if vested.

Card uses FY25 diluted weighted shares 3,528M (S008). Quote-page basic+ count ~3.76B. Diluted basis chosen for conservative per-share / market-cap identity. Musk 423.7M-share grant (~12%) is a future dilution overhang if milestones vest.

live_fields.value: Musk 2025 $1T pay package (approved 2025-11-06, >75% shareholder vote) carries governance/dilution tension: institutional dissent including Norway's sovereign wealth fund on dilution + key-man risk; SEC PX14A6G solicitation filings logged. No new adverse legal event as of 2026-06; the 2018 pay-package Delaware litigation is superseded by the 2025 re-approved grant. Treated as governance overhang, not an active impairment.

No clean numeric FY revenue guide; Q1 2026 (ended 2026-03-31) actuals: revenue $22.39B (+15.8% Y/Y), GAAP NI $477M, FCF $1.44B, produced 408,386 / delivered 358,023 (inventory 27 days vs 15). FY25 deliveries 1,636,129 (-9% Y/Y), energy 46.7GWh (>2x). Robotaxi live Austin/Dallas/Houston (paid miles ~doubled sequentially, unit economics undisclosed); Optimus pre-production (Fremont large-scale line prep starting Q2 2026); FSD moving to subscription-only, 1.3M subs, record Q1 net adds. Capex guided back up to >$25B (AI/Optimus). All consistent with dossier framing as of 2026-06.
